markdown.markdown:
I am a GIS educator, outreach coordinator, community-engaged geospatial practitioner, and mentor at the University of Tennessee, Knoxville.

My work connects geospatial technology with teaching, professional development, community projects, student success, and public-facing communication. I develop applied GIS and UAV learning experiences, support geospatial outreach, collaborate on community mapping projects, and mentor students as they build technical skills and professional pathways.

::: {.callout-note title="Portfolio Focus"}
This site documents selected work in GIS education, workshops and outreach, community-engaged projects, geospatial products, mentoring, service, and professional recognition.
:::


:::: {layout-ncol=2}

::: {.callout-tip title="Teaching"}
Applied GIS, cartography, UAVs, remote sensing, spatial analysis, and professional preparation.

[Explore teaching](teaching.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Workshops & Outreach"}
FAA Part 107 education, GIS professional development, K--12 educator support, and public-facing geospatial training.

[Explore outreach](outreach.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Community GIS Projects"}
Applied mapping, UAV, remote sensing, and geospatial projects developed with community partners and students.

[Explore community projects](community-projects.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Geospatial Portfolio"}
Selected maps, web applications, UAV products, cartographic outputs, spatial analyses, and geospatial communication materials.

[Explore geospatial work](geospatial-portfolio.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Mentoring & Student Success"}
Undergraduate research, conference preparation, career pathways, professional networking, and student development.

[Explore mentoring](mentoring.qmd)
:::

::: {.callout-tip title="Service & Leadership"}
Professional organization service, program development, conference planning, outreach leadership, and community engagement.

[Explore service](service.qmd)
:::

::::

## Recognition and Contact

- [Awards & Recognition](awards.qmd)
- [CV / Contact](cv.qmd)
